/usr/bin/ar qc libcedar_gcn.a CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/backpressure_controller.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/coordinator_client.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/event_applier.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/gcn_node.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/gcn_service.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/local_compute_thread.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/numa_arena.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/query_dispatcher.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/scatter_gather_router.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/storage_backfill_service.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/tmv_engine.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/src/gcn/watermark_gc.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/generated_proto/gcn_service.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_gcn.dir/generated_proto/gcn_service.grpc.pb.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcedar_gcn.a
